title: Vietnamese Spring Rolls with Rice Noodle Salad
description: A fusion of Vietnamese and Italian flavors, these spring rolls are served with a refreshing rice noodle salad.
instructions: Cook rice noodle according to package instructions.
Chop fresh herbs and set aside.
Grate carrot and zucchini and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together peanut butter, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, and salt.
Add grated carrot and zucchini to the peanut butter mixture and stir to combine.
Add cooked rice noodle to the peanut butter mixture and stir to combine.
Add chopped fresh herbs to the peanut butter mixture and stir to combine.
Fill spring rolls with the peanut butter noodle mixture.
Serve spring rolls with additional fresh herbs on top.
